qrcode.title: QR Code
qrcode.desc: Unogona kudhinda uye unamira QR code iyi pachinhu. Kuiskana kunokuendesa zvakananga papeji rino.

form.name: Zita Rechigadzirwa
form.location_public: Wese munhu anogona kuona nzvimbo iyi
form.location_private: Iwe chete ndiwe unogona kuona izvi
form.location_empty: Hapana nzvimbo yakatsanangurwa mukamuri rino parizvino. Tanga kunyora kuti ugadzire imwe.

messages.quick_add_success: ✓ "{{barcode}}" yakawedzerwa nekukurumidza - unogona kugadzirisa gare gare
messages.not_found: ⚠ Chigadzirwa hachina kuwanikwa mudhatabhesi. Unogona kutsvaga paGoogle.

login.title: Pinda
login.subtitle: Tarisa zvese zvaunazvo pamba zvine hungwaru
login.terms_beta: Shanduro yeBETA: HomeInventory iri panguva yekuyedzwa. Hapana chivimbo chinopihwa pamusoro pekuchengetedzwa kana kugarisana kwedata rako.
login.terms_disclaimer: Chisungo: Nekushandisa uku kunyorera, unobvuma kuti haugone kuda mubhadharo chero upi zvawo pamusoro pekurasika kwedata, matambudziko ekuwana, kana kumwe kukanganisa kwehunyanzvi.
login.terms_backup: Kuchengetedza Data: Tinokurudzira zvikuru kuchengetedza ruzivo rwako rwakakosha nguva nenguva.

register.title: Mauya kuHomeInventory
register.subtitle: Gadzira account nyowani kana ubatane neimba iripo
register.create_house_desc: 🏠 Imba itsva ichagadzirwa uye iwe uchawana Ki yeImba yakasarudzika. Goverana kiyi iyi nemhuri kuti vakwanise kuona zvawakaisa mukati.
register.join_house_desc: 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Pinda Ki yeImba yawakagoveranwa nayo kuti ubatane neimba iripo. Munhu wese ane kiyi anogona kuona zvinhu zvakagoverwa.
register.password_length: Password inofanira kunge ine mavara anosvika pazvi6
register.key_required: Ki yeImba inodiwa kuti ubatane neimba iripo

key_created.title: 🎉 Imba Yakatangwa!
key_created.subtitle: Chengeta ki iri pazasi panzvimbo yakachengeteka
key_created.warning: Zvakakosha: Ki iyi icharatidzwa kamwe chete. Goverana nayo nemhuri kuti vakwanise kuwana zvinhu zvakafanana.

email_verification.title: 📧 Kusimbiswa kweEmail Kunodiwa
email_verification.message: Akaunti yagatangwa! Ndapota simbisa kero yako yeemail kuti upinde.
email_verification.step_2: Dzvanya <1>"Simbisa Akaunti Yangu"</1> bhatani riri mutsamba yeemail.
email_verification.spam_note: Tarisa folda yespam/junk kana email isina kusvika.
email_verification.key_note: Zvakakosha: Kiibhodhi yemba yako yakatumirwawo muemail. Unogona kuigovera nemhuri.

forgot_password.title: Wakanganwa Password
forgot_password.subtitle: Tanga nzira yakachengeteka yekudzorera kuti uwane account yako zvakare.
forgot_password.email_success: Kana account iripo, linki yekudzorera password inoshanda kwemaminitsi gumi nemashanu yatotumirwa.
forgot_password.recovery_mode_info: Email haina kushanda pamaserveri ano. Ramba uchishandisa Recovery Key yawakachengeta panguva yekugadzira account.

reset_password.title: Dzorerazve Pasiwedhi
reset_password.subtitle: Shandisa chinongedzo chakachengeteka kuseta pasiwedhi nyowani.
reset_password.missing_token: Chinongedzo chekudzorerazve pasiwedhi chinoita sezvisina kukwana kana kuti chakaputsika.

recovery_setup.title: Gadzira Kiye Rekudzoreredza
recovery_setup.subtitle: Kusvikira izvi zvapera, account yako haina kutarirwa senyakachengeteka pakudzoreredza pasiwedhi yemuno.
recovery_setup.warning: Kiye iyi icharatidzwa kamwe chete chete. Chengetedza mu manejimendi epasiwedhi kana imwe nzvimbo yakachengeteka isina internet.
recovery_setup.description: Nekuti email haina kushanda, unongokwanisa chete kudzoreredza password yako nekushandisa kiyi iyi munguva yemberi.

recovery_key_modal.subtitle: Kiyi iyi inoratidzwa kamwechete chete.
recovery_key_modal.warning: Kana ukarasikirwa nekiyi iyi kana email iri kudzima, unogona kusakwanisa kudzoreredza password yako. Kata uye uichengetedze zvakachengeteka.

auth.password_requirements: Shandisa zvishoma {{min}} mavara ane mavara makuru, mavara madiki, nhamba, uye chiratidzo.

filters.no_items: Hapana zvinhu zvinowirirana ne sefa iyi

beta_banner.title: BETA:
beta_banner.text: HomeInventory parizvino iri mukuyedzwa uye chikamu chehobby. Hapana vimbiso inopihwa yekuchengetedzwa kana kuchengeteka kwedata. Ndokumbira chengetedza ma backups ezvakakosha ruzivo.

messages.house_leave_confirm: Uri nechokwadi here kuti unoda kusiya "{{name}}"?
messages.connection_error: Haugone kubatana kune seva. Tarisa kubatana kwako kweinternet.
messages.username_len_error: Username inofanira kuva nezvinopfuura mavara matatu
messages.password_min_len: Password itsva inofanira kuva nemavara anosvika 6 pachishandiswa
messages.member_kick_confirm: Uri shuwa kuti unoda kubvisa "{{name}}" mumba?

my_houses.title: Dzimba Dzangu
my_houses.no_house: Hausi nhengo yeimba ipi zvayo parizvino
my_houses.info: 💡 Unogona kuve nhengo dzemba dzakawanda uye kuchinja pakati padzo. Imba imwe neimwe ine zvayo zvakasiyana.

house_info.title: Kiyi Yemba Inoshanda
house_info.share_info: 💡 Vashandisi vaunogovera kiyi iyi navo vanogona kuwana zvinhu zvako nekushandisa sarudzo yekuti "Join House" panguva yekunyoresa.
house_info.invite_desc: Govera kiyi yako yeimba kuti nhengo dzemhuri dzikwanise kuwana zvinhu zvakafanana. Nhengo imwe neimwe inopinda neakaunti yayo asi inowana data rakafanana.

security.title: Chengetedzo
security.recovery_key_desc: Unogona kugadzira kiyi nyowani yekudzorera password yemunharaunda.
security.recovery_key_missing: Hapana kiyi yekudzorera inoonekwa kune account iyi parizvino.
security.recovery_key_unavailable: Kiyi yekudzorera yazvino haigone kuratidzwa. Gadzira patsva kana zvichidiwa.
security.recovery_key_modal_desc: Simbisa password yako yazvino kuti uwedzere. Kiyi nyowani icharatidzwa kamwe chete.

join_house.title: Batanidza Imba
join_house.key_help: Pinda kiyi yawakagamuchira kubva kumhuri yako

create_house.title: Gadzira Imba Itsva
create_house.name_help: Kana yasiiwa isina chinhu, ichanzi "Imba Yangu Itsva"
create_house.info: ℹ️ Mhando dzakajairwa nemakamuri zvichagadzirwa kuimba itsva. Unogona kuzvigadzirisa gare gare.

username.title: Chinja Zita Remushandisi
username.help: mavara 3-30, mavara, manhamba, underscore uye dash chete

inventory.title: Zvinhu Zviripo
inventory.subtitle: {{count}} zvinhu zvawanikwa
inventory.delete_confirm: Uri kuona kuti unoda here kudzima chinhu ichi?

categories.title: Zvikamu
categories.subtitle: {{count}} zvikamu
categories.delete_confirm: Uri kuona here kuti unoda kudzima chikamu ichi?

rooms.title: Imba
rooms.subtitle: {{count}} dzimba
rooms.delete_confirm: Uri nechokwadi chekuti unoda kudzima imba iyi?

users.confirm_ban: Uri kunyatsochokwadi here kuti unoda {{status}} mushandisi uyu?
users.confirm_delete_1: Uri kunyatsochokwadi here kuti unoda kubvisa mushandisi "{{username}}"?
users.confirm_delete_2: ⚠️ YAMBIRA: Izvi zvichabvisa ZVACHOSE data rese (inventory, makamuri, zvikamu) zvemushandisi "{{username}}"!
users.confirm_delete_3: 🚨 YAMBIRA YEKUPEDZISIRA: Akaunti "{{username}}" uye data rese richabviswa ZVISINGADZOKERE. Unoda kuenderera mberi here?

logs.title: Mabhuku eAdmin
logs.no_errors: // Sisitimu iri nyore, hapana mabhuku ezvikanganiso.

hero.description: Shandura zvinyorwa zvemumba zvako kuita zvemagetsi. Rongedza zvinhu, kukoka mhuri, uye uwane kubva kune chero kupi zvako. Zvemazuva ano, zvakachengeteka, uye zviri nyore kushandisa.

features.title: Nei <1>HomeInventory</1>?
features.subtitle: Zvese zvinhu zvinokubatsira kuronga imba mumunda mumwechete

categorize.title: Rongedza Zvinhu
categorize.desc: Ronga zvinhu zvose nemakamuri uye zvikamu, uwane zvaunoda mumasekonzi.

family.title: Kukoka Mhuri neKi ki yeImba
family.desc: Koka nhengo dzemhuri nekhibhodi yako yepamba yakasarudzika, gadzirai inventory pamwe chete.

access.title: Kuwana Kubva Kupi Kwese
access.desc: Pamba, kubasa, kana pazororo - svika zvakachengeteka pa inventory yako kubva kupi zvako.

barcode.title: Kuwedzera Nekukurumidza neBarcode
barcode.desc: Skanai mabhaakodhi ezvigadzirwa, ruzivo runopindirwa otomatiki.

security.title: Chengetedzo uye Kuvanzika
security.desc: Dhata rako rakavanzwa uye rakachengetedzwa ne KVKK inoenderana nehuwandu hweinfrastructure.

backup.title: Backup & Tumira Kunze
backup.desc: Ita backup ye inventory yako muJSON fomati, dzorerai paunenge uchida.

cta_bottom.title: Tanga Kushandisa Zvino!
cta_bottom.description: Gadzira account yemahara uye digitiza inventory yepamba yako. Kunyoresa kunotora masekondi mashoma chete.

footer.desc: Chikuva chiri nyore uye chakachengeteka chekudigitala inventory yepamba yako.

landing.preview_privacy_notice: Maonero eDemo: hapana data chaiyo yemushandisi inoratidzwa.

inventory.title: Zvigadzirwa
inventory.content: Pano unogona kuwedzera nekuverenga zvinhu zvako. Tevera zvese zvinhu zvepamba panzvimbo imwechete!

house_key.title: Ki reImba
house_key.content: Iyi ndiyo ki yeimba yako, shandisa kuti ukoke vamwe. Wedzera nhengo dzemhuri kuimba yako!

categories.title: Zvikamu
categories.content: Rongedza nekuisa zvinhu zvako muzvikamu. Magetsi, fenicha, kicheni, uye zvimwe zvakawanda!

google_house_select.title: Mauya!
google_house_select.subtitle: Mawakapinda neGoogle. Zvino sarudza imba.
google_house_select.house_key_hint: Pinda kiye re64-character rawakapihwa nemumwe wemhuri

scanner.title: Skena Bhakodhi
scanner.permission_error: Kubvumidzwa kwekamera kwarambwa. Tarisa marongero ebrowser.
scanner.busy_error: Kamera iri kushanda. Vhara mamwe maapp.
scanner.zoom_hint: 💡 Wedzera zoom kuti zvinyatsojeka uye bata foni yakadzikama
scanner.invalid_qr: QR code iyi haisi yeapp iyi.
scanner.not_found: Chigadzirwa hachina kuwanikwa. Edza barcode yakasiyana.

item_qr.hint_mobile: 📱 Skanai QR kodhi iyi nefoni yako kuti muwane chinhu ichi nekukurumidza
item_qr.usage_desc: Dhinda QR kodhi uye ukate pane chinhu ichi. Skanai nefoni yako kuti muwane peji iri pakarepo!

pending.title: Kumirira mvumo kubva kumuridzi weimba
pending.description: Chikumbiro chako che "{{house}}" chiri kumirira sarudzo.

no_house.title: Hausi kubatana neimba pari zvino
no_house.description: Gadzira imba itsva kana tumira chikumbiro chekubatana kune iripo.

create.title: Gadzira Imba Itsva
create.description: Tanga yako yega yekuchengetera zvinhu pamba uye ramba uchishanda ipapo ipapo.
create.name_placeholder: semuenzaniso My Home, Summer House, Storage

join.title: Tumira Chikumbiro Chekubatana
join.description: Pinda kiyi yeimba uye tumira chikumbiro zvakananga kumuridzi weimba.

verification.subject: 🏠 HomeInventory - 📧 Kusimbiswa kweEmail Kunodiwa
verification.headerSubtitle: Gadzira account nyowani kana ubatane neimba iripo
verification.intro: Akaunti yagatangwa! Ndapota simbisa kero yako yeemail kuti upinde.
verification.warningBody: Tarisa folda yespam/junk kana email isina kusvika.
verification.houseKeyNote: Zvakakosha: Kiibhodhi yemba yako yakatumirwawo muemail. Unogona kuigovera nemhuri.
features: 💡 Unogona kuve nhengo dzemba dzakawanda uye kuchinja pakati padzo. Imba imwe neimwe ine zvayo zvakasiyana.
verification.fallback: Chinongedzo chekudzorerazve pasiwedhi chinoita sezvisina kukwana kana kuti chakaputsika.

welcome.subject: Mauya kuHomeInventory
welcome.headerSubtitle: Gadzira account nyowani kana ubatane neimba iripo
welcome.houseKeyNote: Iyi ndiyo ki yeimba yako, shandisa kuti ukoke vamwe. Wedzera nhengo dzemhuri kuimba yako!
features: 💡 Unogona kuve nhengo dzemba dzakawanda uye kuchinja pakati padzo. Imba imwe neimwe ine zvayo zvakasiyana.

houseJoinDecision.bodyLine2: Chikumbiro chako che "{{house}}" chiri kumirira sarudzo.

houseKick.bodyLine2: Gadzira imba itsva kana tumira chikumbiro chekubatana kune iripo.

passwordReset.subject: 🔐 Dzorerazve Pasiwedhi
passwordReset.intro: Tanga nzira yakachengeteka yekudzorera kuti uwane account yako zvakare.
passwordReset.warningBody: Kana account iripo, linki yekudzorera password inoshanda kwemaminitsi gumi nemashanu yatotumirwa.
passwordReset.fallback: Chinongedzo chekudzorerazve pasiwedhi chinoita sezvisina kukwana kana kuti chakaputsika.
